LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CONTEST PROMOTIONS, LLC'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CPF-16-514771 WITH CASE CGC-15-547630 IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION. THIS CASE IS CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NUMBER 514771 FOR ALL PURPOSES. CASE 514711 IS THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FURTHER FILINGS MUST BE IN THAT CASE ONLY. SINGLE WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Michael F. Wright, Esq. (310-712-6195) appears telephonically as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CONTEST PROMOTIONS, LLC'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CPF-16-514771 WITH CASE CGC-15-547630 is GRANTED. Defendant City of San Francisco does not oppose the motion. This case is consolidated with case number 514771 for all purposes. Case 514711 is the lead case and all further filings must be in that case only. Single written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098, Bus. Tel: 415-717-9768. (D302)
